tests_written: health returns HTTP 200 with degraded database status when DATABASE_URL is absent
app router builds without a database pool
users, OAuth accounts, and sessions round-trip through Postgres migrations
session revocation removes sessions from active-session lookup

tests_written: user-owned repositories enforce per-owner case-insensitive uniqueness
repository creation grants owner permissions and paginates through the standard list envelope
users cannot create repositories under a different user owner
organization repositories require org owner/admin membership
teams and team memberships persist under organizations
commit metadata and repository git refs round-trip through Postgres
